mapper.sql: id, name, activity_code, upgrade_notice_article_id, activity_term_article_id, privacy_agreement_article_id, start_time, end_time, release_time, upgrade_purpose, upgrade_function, statement, state, total_file_size, baseline, baseline_code, size_calc_time, is_type_approval_relevant, type_approval_assessment_state, release_note_article_id, notice_consent_required, terms_consent_required, privacy_consent_required, rxswin, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_activity ( id, name, activity_code, upgrade_notice_article_id, activity_term_article_id, privacy_agreement_article_id, start_time, end_time, release_time, upgrade_purpose, upgrade_function, statement, state, total_file_size, baseline, baseline_code, size_calc_time, is_type_approval_relevant, type_approval_assessment_state, release_note_article_id, notice_consent_required, terms_consent_required, privacy_consent_required, rxswin, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{activityCode}, #{upgradeNoticeArticleId}, #{activityTermArticleId}, #{privacyAgreementArticleId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{releaseTime}, #{upgradePurpose}, #{upgradeFunction}, #{statement}, #{state}, #{totalFileSize}, #{baseline}, #{baselineCode}, #{sizeCalcTime}, #{isTypeApprovalRelevant}, #{typeApprovalAssessmentState}, #{releaseNoteArticleId}, #{noticeConsentRequired}, #{termsConsentRequired}, #{privacyConsentRequired}, #{rxswin}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_activity ( id, name, activity_code, upgrade_notice_article_id, activity_term_article_id, privacy_agreement_article_id, start_time, end_time, release_time, upgrade_purpose, upgrade_function, statement, state, total_file_size, baseline, baseline_code, size_calc_time, is_type_approval_relevant, type_approval_assessment_state, release_note_article_id, notice_consent_required, terms_consent_required, privacy_consent_required, rxswin, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.name}, #{item.activityCode}, #{item.upgradeNoticeArticleId}, #{item.activityTermArticleId}, #{item.privacyAgreementArticleId}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.releaseTime}, #{item.upgradePurpose}, #{item.upgradeFunction}, #{item.statement}, #{item.state}, #{item.totalFileSize}, #{item.baseline}, #{item.baselineCode}, #{item.sizeCalcTime}, #{item.isTypeApprovalRelevant}, #{item.typeApprovalAssessmentState}, #{item.releaseNoteArticleId}, #{item.noticeConsentRequired}, #{item.termsConsentRequired}, #{item.privacyConsentRequired}, #{item.rxswin}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_activity t SET
t.name = #{name},
t.activity_code = #{activityCode},
t.upgrade_notice_article_id = #{upgradeNoticeArticleId},
t.activity_term_article_id = #{activityTermArticleId},
t.privacy_agreement_article_id = #{privacyAgreementArticleId},
t.start_time = #{startTime},
t.end_time = #{endTime},
t.release_time = #{releaseTime},
t.upgrade_purpose = #{upgradePurpose},
t.upgrade_function = #{upgradeFunction},
t.statement = #{statement},
t.state = #{state},
t.total_file_size = #{totalFileSize},
t.baseline = #{baseline},
t.baseline_code = #{baselineCode},
t.size_calc_time = #{sizeCalcTime},
t.is_type_approval_relevant = #{isTypeApprovalRelevant},
t.type_approval_assessment_state = #{typeApprovalAssessmentState},
t.release_note_article_id = #{releaseNoteArticleId},
t.notice_consent_required = #{noticeConsentRequired},
t.terms_consent_required = #{termsConsentRequired},
t.privacy_consent_required = #{privacyConsentRequired},
t.rxswin = #{rxswin},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_activity t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_activity t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_activity t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_activity t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
